summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Discord Stream Selfbot Control Panel iteration 2 - validated bash script syntax, confirmed removal of 'original' quality profile, verified 4K quality profiles (2160p30/2160p60), tested 4K bitrate recommendations, and confirmed frontend dropdown changes. All specified requirements from review request successfully implemented and working.
passed_tests: Bash Scripts: install.sh syntax validation passed
Bash Scripts: update.sh syntax validation passed
Bash Scripts: config.sh syntax validation passed
Backend: GET /api/profiles - 4K profile labels correct ('4K / 30 FPS', '4K / 60 FPS')
Backend: GET /api/recommend-bitrate - 4K H265 30fps returns 8200/11900 kbps (80% of H264)
Backend: GET /api/recommend-bitrate - 4K H265 60fps returns 11500/15300 kbps (80% of H264)
Backend: POST /api/presets with qualityProfile=2160p30 creates correct 3840x2160 resolution
Backend: POST /api/presets with qualityProfile=2160p60 creates correct resolution and fps
Frontend: Presets page quality dropdown shows '4K / 30 FPS' option
Frontend: Presets page quality dropdown shows '4K / 60 FPS' option
Frontend: Presets page quality dropdown does NOT show 'Original' option
Frontend: All navigation pages accessible (Dashboard, Channels, Presets, Events, Logs)
Frontend: Manual stream start form with 'Jetzt starten' button working
Full CRUD workflow: Dashboard, Channels, Presets, Events pages all functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and quality profile changes verified), Bash Scripts: 100% (3/3 scripts have valid syntax)
